question: Is the image captured from a low angle position near ground level, looking upward with an ultra-wide perspective?
Is the perspective positioned beside a curved floor rail in the foreground?
Does the lighting consist of a mix of dim red safety lights and cold blue starlight?
Is the upper portion of the image a white hemispherical dome interior with visible curved structural ribs?
Is there a narrow observation slit opening located in the upper right portion of the dome?
Does the slit opening reveal a deep blue night sky with clear star points and no overlaid annotations?
Is there a large telescope on an equatorial mount positioned near the center of the frame?
Is the telescope tube matte dark gray and aimed toward the upper right at the slit?
Is a thinner guide scope mounted parallel above the main telescope tube?
Are there exactly two curved metal rails with roller assemblies between the mount base and the floor?
Is there a bundle of black cables hanging on the right side of the telescope?
Do the cables coil loosely near the floor and rest on a transparent plastic star chart with dot patterns?
Is there an open, black, hard-shell equipment case with no markings sitting on the floor in the left-center area?
Does the equipment case contain exactly seven cylindrical eyepieces and one metal adapter ring?
Is one of the eyepieces inside the case brass-colored?
Is there exactly one round pure-black lens cap on the floor in front of the equipment case?
Is there exactly one L-shaped hex wrench on the floor with the short end pointing toward the lower left?
Is there exactly one small red flashlight on the floor with its lamp head pointing toward the right?
Is there a partially unfolded folding chair in the lower right corner with a dark down jacket draped over it?
Are there stacked dark gray gloves beside the chair with fingertips pointing toward the left?
Is there a stainless steel thermos standing upright in the lower left foreground with the lid closed?
Are there exactly two operators present in the scene?
Is one operator standing beside the telescope with their back to the camera, wearing dark gear and a knit cap?
Is the standing operator wearing a headlamp emitting red light?
Is the standing operator's left hand bracing the mount while the right hand reaches toward a black control box?
Is the second operator crouching beside the equipment case holding a tablet with an unlit (black) screen?
Is there a work table in the left background with a closed laptop and a dew heater controller?
